title: Infinicrafts
description:
Gain the ability to craft all* uncraftable items or blocks in Minecraft!

*most
body:
[![Requires Infinilib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3588988b5328043baecee8a8fbfc04da81e0331a.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/infinilib)
[![Requires Infiniresources](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88f9ed70232bb6ba428929e707b8a14da1003bc.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/infiniresources)

[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ca9a5bb2d57afa6019b34cd08b90b1cfb930ce.png)](https://discord.gg/WBqEXSt9qy)

---

### IMPORTANT NOTE!
In order for the datapack to work, you **must** install the `Infinicrafts Resources` resourcepack! This resourcepack is attached in each version, and you must install both files from the **versions** list! If you simply click on *Download* on this page/the home page of the datapack, **it will only install the datapack without the required textures**!

---

A datapack that adds crafting recipes for a bunch of blocks and items that were previously uncraftable! Blocks like the command block, bedrock, and items like the totem of undying!
Craft away to your hearts intent! DM my discord `@error_dev` if you would like to see any items added! This datapack will definitely be updated.

For a full list of features, please refer to the wiki (linked on sidebar).

<details>
<summary>Added Features (SPOILERS)</summary>
This datapack adds a lot of features. Mainly recipes. Let's go over some of them.

1. The datapack adds two custom functions. Using [/function infinicrafts:give_duplicating_template] will give you a Duplicating Template and [/function infinicrafts:test] will test the datapack systems.
2. It adds a bunch of recipes for previously uncraftable items. Blocks like barriers can now be crafted! For a full list of added recipes, view the Gallery tab.
3. It adds 5 new tags. The #infinicrafts:uncraftable tag is for all the blocks or items that were previously uncraftable but now can be crafted. The #infinicrafts:deepslate tag includes only cobbled deepslate and deepslate, and no variants. The #infinicrafts:glass tag includes all types of glass except glass panes. This inludes glass, tinted glass, and all colored glass. The #infinicrafts:signs tag includes all signs and hanging signs.
</details>
